# sedai_groups (Data Source)

Lists every Sedai group in the tenant. Useful for bulk operations (`for_each`) or for discovering groups created outside Terraform before importing them.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) All groups visible to the caller. Each entry has `id` and `name`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The Sedai group ID.
- `name` (String) The group name.
